name: dungeon mouse
description: A small, skittering mouse. It's timid and tends to flee from you.

name: blazing firemouse
description: A small, skittering mouse with a fiery disposition.

name: kitten
description: A small kitten that looks up to its parent cat.  You can only hope it survives long enough to grow up.

name: roach
description: A loathsome bug. This cockroach-like creature has few redeeming features.  It's not very strong.

name: doom bat
description: A large, menacing bat. It flutters around in the shadows, its eyes glowing with malevolent intent.

name: mask imp
description: A small, hostile creature hiding behind a rudimentary mask.

name: needle spider
description: A small, skittering spider. It could well be poisonous.  It's certainly fast moving.

name: dungeon rat
description: A mangy rat with too many teeth. Slightly tougher than a roach but no scarier.

name: large mask imp
description: An imp that hides its identity behind a grotesque mask.  It's slightly larger and stronger than its smaller kin.

name: cat
description: A sleek and agile cat, always on the prowl for its next meal.  Mice beware.

name: black ant
description: A proud ant worker, far superior to its red ant foes.

name: red ant
description: A proud ant worker, far superior to its black ant foes.

name: hound
description: A loyal and fierce dog, trained to hunt and protect.

name: kobold spearman
description: A scaly humanoid clutching a bundle of crude spears. It hangs back from the fight, looking for a clear throw.

name: soldier bug
description: A soldier bug. This insect has a glossy carapace and razor-sharp pincers.  It's stronger than it looks.

name: developed mask imp
description: An imp of unusual size, hiding itself behind a leering mask.

name: sheet ghost
description: A twisted piece of cloth that adopts a malevolent form, ethereal yet all too real.

name: Mage
description: Fragile, but carries the amulet of light.
startingInventory: DAGGER | AMULET_OF_LIGHT | WAND_WATER | WAND_OIL | WAND_GRASS | WAND_FUNGUS | WAND_FIRE | WAND_DOG | WAND_DETONATION | WAND_MAGIC_MISSILE | WAND_BANISHMENT | WAND_LIGHTNING | HEALING_POTION

name: kobold fighter
description: A small, scaly humanoid wielding a crude blade. It hisses at you with malice.

name: bug prodigy
description: The Prodigy might once have been a soldier bug, but it has evolved into something disturbingly humanoid.

name: Rogue
description: Quick and evasive, lightly armed.
startingInventory: DAGGER | FIRE_BOMB*5 | OIL_BOMB*5 | BLAST_BOMB*5 | FREEZE_BOMB*5 | HEALING_POTION

name: kobold general
description: A tall, scaly humanoid in worn ceremonial plate. He barks orders to his kin and raises a glowing standard.

name: kobold cleaver
description: A heavyset, scaly humanoid hefting a battered meat-cleaver. The blade looks plenty capable of finding the gaps in plate.

name: barbarian princess
description: A fierce barbarian princess, fearless and pursuing her own goals

name: horrible mask imp
description: Far, far bigger than imps are supposed to be, you dread to imagine what might be hidden beneath that ornate mask.

name: Warrior
description: Hardy fighter with sword and scale mail.

name: blob
description: A large, unpleasant creature. It oozes across the floor, consuming everything in its path.

name: kissyblob
description: A large, revolting, indiscriminately predatory creature, capable of spawning further horrible blobs when fed enough flesh.

name: stalking horror
description: A towering, nightmarish creature of malice and hunger.  Stories say that if you run away it will simply reappear at your side.

name: black ant hill
description: A colony of black ants has broken through into the dungeon here, intent on extracting resources.

name: red ant hill
description: A colony of red ants has broken through into the dungeon here, intent on extracting resources.

name: elder roach
description: This cockroach like creature seethes with a malevolent intelligence.

name: vampire bat
description: Far nastier than its ordinary doombat brethren, it wants to suck your blood.

name: mask imp ringleader
description: A small, hostile creature hiding behind a rudimentary mask.  This particular one seems to be a bit bolder than the others.

name: black widow
description: A revolting spider laden with venom.

name: roland the dungeon rat
description: This rat sees itself as an adventurer, but it's just as mangy and disease-ridden as the others.

name: elder large mask imp
description: An imp that hides its identity behind a grotesque mask.  This one has grown really quite large and seems more independent.

name: kobold rifleman
description: Somehow, this otherwise harmless kobold has got hold of a crude firearm, which it uses to dominate its kin.

name: elite soldier bug
description: A highly experienced insect, veteran of many tough fights.

name: vile imp
description: A particularly horrid imp, this one capers and leers while still hiding behind its unpleasant mask.

name: spectre
description: A twisted piece of cloth whose mouth opens widerâ€¦ and widerâ€¦

name: kobold spartan
description: This kobold is a lot tougher than the others, and seems to have a six pack.  Isâ€¦ thisâ€¦ Sparta??

name: mutated prodigy
description: A bug that evolved into a humanoid -- but something went wrong.

name: kobold monarch
description: A kobold ruler, decked in gold and jewels.

name: kobold butcher
description: This kobold looks a lot stronger, a lot crazier, and a lot more dangerous than the rest.

name: horror mask
description: This must be an imp -- but it's grown to insane proportions and moves with terrifying speed.
